{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201617418B8AD4E04EBAB31DB566"}"},"total":3484},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7266461608791687992","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，里面有搞笑的地方也有让人感动的地方，看着里面一个个角色成长，仿佛变成了一个个真人，有血有肉，很热血[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691855040,"group_id":"7187616348866874427","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6Vq+8/Qa7RHV7gA+BlOENDx3HHrEGDK16l80jM+HaJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528048&x-signature=lJXJWxMJlPQ4kLKophYWoYhmpaE%3D","user_id":"3404516487867287","user_name":"爱吃炸芸豆的嗯慕千汐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3404516487867287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7187616348866874427","book_info":{"abstract":"【军旅+特种兵+腹黑+轻松搞笑】
　　苏晨穿越蓝星，从无到有，打造一支闻风丧胆的超级部队。
　　“我不服，苏晨这个混蛋带着一个连扮成大姑娘，装作慰问团把我们端了。这根本不是战术，这就是利用我们的感情投机取巧！”
　　“你们知道这十几天我怎么过的吗？吃不好睡不好，到处寻找苏晨这孙子。就在我最累的时候，他突然出现把我打成孙子了！”
　　“还是苏晨的爹最惨，刚到地方就被轰掉直接判负，气的老爷子差点没救回来！”
　　不久后，一支恐怖蓝军横空出世，打的各个王牌闻风丧胆。
　　大家发出憋屈的口号：绝地反击，活捉苏晨
